requirement_topic.en: OCPP Interoperability, IEC 61000 EMC, and Networked Charger Evidence
requirement_topic.zh: OCPP互操作、IEC 61000电磁兼容与联网充电设备证据
requirement_topic.zht: OCPP互操作、IEC 61000電磁兼容與聯網充電設備證據

summary.en: Networked public chargers in Algeria should be specified with a back-office protocol accepted by the charge-point operator or project owner. In IEC-aligned EV infrastructure, that commonly means OCPP for remote monitoring, access control, fault reporting, billing integration, and load management. EMC evidence should cover IEC 61851-21-2 for off-board EV supply equipment and the relevant IEC 61000 immunity, emission, harmonic, and power-quality tests. For DC CCS2 stations, charger-to-vehicle communication should follow the IEC / CCS communication stack required by the vehicle and connector ecosystem, not China GB/T 27930.
summary.zh: 阿尔及利亚联网公共充电设备应采用充电点运营商或项目业主接受的后台协议。在IEC体系EV基础设施中，这通常意味着使用OCPP实现远程监控、访问控制、故障报告、计费集成和负载管理。电磁兼容证据应覆盖车外EV供电设备IEC 61851-21-2，以及相关IEC 61000抗扰度、发射、谐波和电能质量测试。对于直流CCS2站，充电设备与车辆通信应遵循车辆和接口生态要求的IEC / CCS通信栈，而不是中国GB/T 27930。
summary.zht: 阿爾及利亞聯網公共充電設備應採用充電點運營商或項目業主接受的後台協議。在IEC體系EV基礎設施中，這通常意味著使用OCPP實現遠程監控、訪問控制、故障報告、計費集成和負載管理。電磁兼容證據應覆蓋車外EV供電設備IEC 61851-21-2，以及相關IEC 61000抗擾度、發射、諧波和電能質量測試。對於直流CCS2站，充電設備與車輛通訊應遵循車輛和接口生態要求的IEC / CCS通訊棧，而不是中國GB/T 27930。

standards_or_laws: IEC 61851-21-2 (EMC requirements for off-board EV supply equipment)
IEC 61000 series (electromagnetic compatibility, immunity, emissions, harmonics, and power quality)
IEC 63584 / OCPP for networked charger back-office communication
IEC 61851-24 / CCS communication context for DC charging

summary.en: China DC fast chargers commonly use GB/T 27930-2023 for communication between the off-board charger and battery management system. That CAN-based protocol is not a substitute for OCPP back-office integration and is not the CCS2 DC communication route. China EMC evidence under GB/T 18487.2 or GB/T 17626 / GB 4824 equivalents may support engineering review, but the Algeria IEC route should be confirmed using IEC editions and the actual IEC-connector hardware.
summary.zh: 中国直流快充通常采用GB/T 27930-2023作为非车载充电机与电池管理系统之间的通信协议。该CAN总线协议不能替代OCPP后台集成，也不是CCS2直流通信路径。中国GB/T 18487.2或GB/T 17626 / GB 4824等电磁兼容证据可支持工程审查，但阿尔及利亚IEC路径应使用IEC版本并在实际IEC接口硬件上确认。
summary.zht: 中國直流快充通常採用GB/T 27930-2023作為非車載充電機與電池管理系統之間的通訊協議。該CAN總線協議不能替代OCPP後台集成，也不是CCS2直流通訊路徑。中國GB/T 18487.2或GB/T 17626 / GB 4824等電磁兼容證據可支持工程審查，但阿爾及利亞IEC路徑應使用IEC版本並在實際IEC接口硬體上確認。

gap.en: Confirm the OCPP version, SIM or network-security requirements, remote metering, load-management interface, and operator API before shipment. For EMC, test the Algeria hardware variant against IEC 61851-21-2 and applicable IEC 61000 tests, including harmonic and immunity evidence relevant to Sonelgaz grid connection. For DC chargers, replace GB/T 27930-only communication with the CCS2 / IEC communication stack required by the target vehicles and operator.
gap.zh: 出货前应确认OCPP版本、SIM或网络安全要求、远程计量、负载管理接口和运营商API。电磁兼容方面，应对阿尔及利亚硬件型号按IEC 61851-21-2和适用IEC 61000测试进行验证，包括与Sonelgaz并网相关的谐波和抗扰度证据。对于直流充电设备，应将仅支持GB/T 27930的通信替换为目标车辆和运营商要求的CCS2 / IEC通信栈。
gap.zht: 出貨前應確認OCPP版本、SIM或網絡安全要求、遠程計量、負載管理接口和運營商API。電磁兼容方面，應對阿爾及利亞硬體型號按IEC 61851-21-2和適用IEC 61000測試進行驗證，包括與Sonelgaz併網相關的諧波和抗擾度證據。對於直流充電設備，應將僅支持GB/T 27930的通訊替換為目標車輛和運營商要求的CCS2 / IEC通訊棧。

mandatory_status.target: Project-dependent for OCPP; EMC evidence is expected for electrical equipment and grid-connected chargers, with exact route confirmed through IANOR, importer, project owner, and Sonelgaz requirements
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 27930 is mandatory for China domestic DC communication but does not replace OCPP or CCS2 / IEC communication requirements

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] For Algeria public or networked chargers, confirm OCPP and operator integration separately from IEC safety testing. GB/T 27930-only DC communication and China-only EMC reports should not be treated as sufficient for an IEC / CCS2 / Sonelgaz project package.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 对于阿尔及利亚公共或联网充电设备，应将OCPP及运营商集成与IEC安全测试分别确认。仅支持GB/T 27930的直流通信和仅面向中国的电磁兼容报告，不应视为足以构成IEC / CCS2 / Sonelgaz项目资料包。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 對於阿爾及利亞公共或聯網充電設備，應將OCPP及運營商集成與IEC安全測試分別確認。僅支持GB/T 27930的直流通訊和僅面向中國的電磁兼容報告，不應視為足以構成IEC / CCS2 / Sonelgaz項目資料包。
